hero.headline: Your Pool Deserves the Space Coast's Best
hero.subheadline: Atlantic Coastline Pools keeps your backyard sparkling so you can enjoy it, not maintain it. Family-owned, eco-friendly, and serving Brevard County with detailed care reports after every visit.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Patio Care<br class="hidden md:block"> for the Space Coast
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to deep cleans and patio pressure washing, we handle it all so you can relax poolside.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive recurring care including skimming, brushing, vacuuming, chemical balancing, and filter cleaning. Every visit ends with a detailed report so you always know your pool's health.

cards.title: Chemical Balancing & Water Analysis
cards.description: Expert water testing and precise chemical adjustments to keep pH, chlorine, and alkalinity in the safe zone. Crystal clear water that's gentle on skin and eyes.

cards.title: One-Time Deep Cleans
cards.description: Thorough deep cleaning for pools needing extra attention. Perfect for seasonal openings, pre-sale prep, or restoring a neglected pool to pristine condition.

cards.title: Patio Pressure Washing
cards.description: High-powered pressure washing to blast away algae, grime, and stains from your patio and deck. Optional sealing services to protect and restore your outdoor spaces.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Servicing
cards.description: Reliable maintenance for hotels, community pools, and HOA facilities across Brevard County. Certified technicians and flexible scheduling to keep your commercial pool compliant.

cards.title: Pool Checkups & Estimates
cards.description: Free, no-obligation pool assessments where we evaluate your pool's condition and recommend the best maintenance plan. Zero pressure, just honest advice.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Sparkling Pool

steps.title: Book Your Free Checkup
steps.description: Call or fill out the form and we'll schedule a free pool assessment. We'll evaluate your pool's condition and give you an honest recommendation with no pressure.

steps.title: We Clean & Report
steps.description: Our certified technicians arrive on schedule with eco-friendly products. After every visit, you receive a detailed report with water chemistry readings and recommendations.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Oasis
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready while you enjoy the Space Coast lifestyle. We handle the work so you can just dive in.

about.label: Why Space Coast Families Trust Us
about.headline: Family-Owned Care for Your Family's Pool
about.description: Atlantic Coastline Pools is a family-owned business founded right here in Titusville by Seth Bruton. We treat every pool like it's our own, using eco-friendly products and delivering detailed post-visit reports so you always know exactly what was done and how your water chemistry looks. Certified, insured, and committed to the Brevard County community.

features.title: Detailed Post-Visit Reports
features.description: After every service, you receive a full report documenting cleaning tasks, water chemistry readings, and recommendations for maintaining optimal pool health.

features.title: Eco-Friendly Cleaning Products
features.description: We use environmentally responsible products that are tough on algae and grime but gentle on your family, pets, and the Florida ecosystem.

features.title: Flexible Scheduling, No Contracts
features.description: Available Monday through Saturday, 7AM to 8PM. Choose weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly service. Cancel anytime with zero fees or hassle.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool. Flexible scheduling, no contracts, and cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, we'll come back and make it right at no extra charge. We also guarantee you'll receive a detailed post-visit report after every single service so you're never left wondering what happened with your pool.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days. We'll start with a free pool checkup to assess your pool's condition, then build a customized maintenance plan. Call us at (321) 505-0077 to get started.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve on the Space Coast?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve Titusville, the broader Space Coast, and all of Brevard County. Whether you're near Kennedy Space Center or further south in the county, we've got you covered.

faqs.question: What's included in the post-visit report?
faqs.answer: Every report details the cleaning tasks performed, all water chemistry readings (pH, chlorine, alkalinity, etc.), and personalized recommendations for maintaining optimal pool health between visits.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. You'll receive your detailed service report after each visit so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools and HOA communities?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide professional maintenance for hotels, community pools, and HOA facilities across Brevard County. Certified technicians and flexible scheduling ensure your pool stays clean and compliant.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: Atlantic Coastline Pools is an AMAZING pool cleaning service! Seth takes great pride cleaning my pool. If you care about quality, I HIGHLY recommend Atlantic Coastline Pools for any pool cleaning needs.

testimonials.name: Home Seller
testimonials.text: You will not find a better pool cleaning service anywhere. Seth and his team are fantastic. We hired them when we put our house on the market and it was a great decision. Seth was always willing to go the extra mile to make the pool sparkle.

testimonials.name: Happy Customer
testimonials.text: Always friendly with a smile and efficient with my pool! The pool has never looked better! I love getting the detailed reports after each visit.

benefits: Free pool checkup with every quote
